---
title: "Emily Dickinson — Poems"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r include=F, warning=F, message=F}
source("../../../prep (May 2025).R")
```


```{=html}
<style>
.poem-flex { 
  display:flex; gap:1.5rem; align-items:flex-start;
  border:1px solid #ddd; border-radius:12px; padding:16px; 
  margin:1.25rem 0; max-width:120ch;
}
.poem-col, .summary-col { flex:1 1 0; min-width:0; }
.poem-col pre { white-space:pre-wrap; overflow-wrap:anywhere; margin:0; }
.summary-col { border-left:1px solid #eee; padding-left:16px; }
.summary-col p { margin:.25rem 0 0; }
.topic-chips { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:.4rem; margin:.5rem 0 0; }
.topic-chip { border:1px solid #ddd; padding:.15rem .5rem; border-radius:999px; font-size:.9em; background:#fafafa; }
@media (max-width:820px){
  .poem-flex { flex-direction:column; }
  .summary-col { border-left:0; border-top:1px solid #eee; padding-left:0; padding-top:12px; }
}
</style>


#| label: setup
library(readr); library(dplyr); library(stringr); library(tidyr); library(htmltools)

poems <- read_csv("dickinson analyzed.csv",
  col_types = cols(
    poem_id = col_double(),
    .default = col_character()
  ),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

# Be robust to missing columns
for (nm in c("title","text","summary","topics","synopsis")) {
  if (!nm %in% names(poems)) poems[[nm]] <- NA_character_
}

poems <- poems |>
  mutate(
    title    = coalesce(title, ""),
    text     = coalesce(text, ""),
    summary  = coalesce(summary, ""),
    topics   = coalesce(topics, ""),
    synopsis = coalesce(synopsis, "")
  )




```

```{r}

#| label: helpers
#| echo: false
#| include: false

split_tags <- function(x) {
  x <- trimws(x %||% "")
  if (identical(x, "") || is.na(x)) return(character())
  parts <- unlist(strsplit(x, "\\s*[|,]\\s*"))
  parts[nzchar(parts)]
}
`%||%` <- function(a, b) if (is.null(a)) b else a

```


```{r}

#| label: render
#| results: asis

poems_sorted <- poems |> arrange(poem_id, title)

for (i in seq_len(nrow(poems_sorted))) {
  this <- poems_sorted[i, ]
  if (str_trim(this$title) == "" && str_trim(this$text) == "") next

  header <- paste0(
    if (!is.na(this$poem_id)) paste0(this$poem_id, " — ") else "",
    this$title
  )
  cat("## ", header, "\n\n", sep = "")

  txt        <- htmlEscape(this$text)
  summary_tx <- htmlEscape(this$summary)
  syn_tx     <- htmlEscape(this$synopsis)

  tags <- split_tags(this$topics)
  chips <- if (length(tags)) {
    paste0(
      '<div class="topic-chips">',
      paste(sprintf('<span class="topic-chip">%s</span>', htmlEscape(tags)), collapse=""),
      '</div>'
    )
  } else ""

  cat(
    '<div class="poem-flex">',
      '<div class="poem-col"><pre>', txt, '</pre></div>',
      '<div class="summary-col">',
        if (nzchar(summary_tx)) paste0('<strong>Summary</strong><p>', summary_tx, '</p>') else '',
        if (nzchar(syn_tx))     paste0('<h4>Synopsis</h4><p>',  syn_tx,     '</p>') else '',
        if (length(tags))       '<h4>Topics</h4>' else '',
        chips,
      '</div>',
    '</div>\n\n',
    sep = ""
  )
}

```
